notes: Paraguay are without centre-back Omar Alderete (knee injury) and are monitoring Gabriel Avalos fitness at striker, while Diego Gomez returns from suspension; France present a near-clean bill of health with only Marcus Thuram doubtful (calf problem), and Deschamps is expected to name an unchanged settled XI featuring Mbappe, Olise, Dembele, and Barcola.
home_scorers: Gabriel Avalos (central striker, leads the line)
Julio Enciso (goal threat from wide, scored vs Germany)
Miguel Almiron (counter-attack wide threat, set-piece presence)
away_scorers: Kylian Mbappe (captain, tournament top scorer, leading striker)
Michael Olise (No.10, 5 tournament assists, cutting edge creator)
Ousmane Dembele (wide forward, direct goal threat in electric front line)
